introSection:
Octonauts Rollercoaster Adventure is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Alton Towers in Alton, Staffordshire, England, UK. It is based on the computer-animated series of the same name and its namesake books.

Opened in 2015, it was added as part of an expansion to CBeebies Land and is located on the spot formerly occupied by Beastie, which closed in 2010 and was SBNO until early 2013, and the Space Adventures playground, which closed in 2014.

This coaster was a prototype of a new model line named the Junior Coaster from Zamperla.
fullText:
Octonauts Rollercoaster Adventure is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Alton Towers in Alton, Staffordshire, England, UK. It is based on the computer-animated series of the same name and its namesake books.

Opened in 2015, it was added as part of an expansion to CBeebies Land and is located on the spot formerly occupied by Beastie, which closed in 2010 and was SBNO until early 2013, and the Space Adventures playground, which closed in 2014.

This coaster was a prototype of a new model line named the Junior Coaster from Zamperla.
